title: Blaylock effect
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Blaylock effect''' projected images into the atmosphere of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was rumored to have been in development of this technology, possibly to project as many as 10,000 [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruisers]] into the sky. However, as of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], they were rumored to be having trouble developing it.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]] {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
